ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trade_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade transaction */,
  "nomenclature" TEXT /* Nomenclature or code for the product */,
  "reporter_iso" TEXT /* ISO3 code of the reporter country */,
  "product_code" INTEGER /* Code for the product being traded */,
  "reporter_name" TEXT /* Name of the reporting country */,
  "partner_iso" TEXT /* ISO3 code of the partner country */,
  "partner_name" TEXT /* Name of the partnering country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the transaction */,
  "trade_flow_name" TEXT /* Name of the trade flow (e.g., Import, Export) */,
  "trade_flow_code" INTEGER /* Code for the trade flow */,
  "trade_value_usd" REAL /* Trade value in thousands of USD */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of products traded */,
  "quantity_token" INTEGER /* Token representing quantity type */,
  "qty_unit" TEXT /* Unit of quantity (e.g., Kg, N.Q.) */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "net_weight_kg" REAL /* Net weight of the product in kilograms */,
  "transport_mode" TEXT /* Mode of transportation used (e.g., air, sea, land) */,
  "freight_value" REAL /* Cost of transporting the goods */,
  "insurance_value" REAL /* Insurance cost for the goods */,
  "taxes_and_duties" REAL /* Total taxes and duties paid */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost, including trade value, freight, insurance, and taxes */,
  "reporter_region" TEXT /* Region of the reporting country */,
  "reporter_income_group" TEXT /* Income group of the reporting country */,
  "partner_region" TEXT /* Region of the partnering country */,
  "partner_income_group" TEXT /* Income group of the partnering country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_transactions_reporter_income_group FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_income_group") REFERENCES income_groups ("income_group_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_transactions_trade_flow_code FOREIGN KEY ("trade_flow_code") REFERENCES trade_flows ("trade_flow_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_transactions_product_code FOREIGN KEY ("product_code") REFERENCES products ("product_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_transactions_reporter_region FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_transactions_partner_income_group FOREIGN KEY ("partner_income_group") REFERENCES income_groups ("income_group_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_transactions_partner_region FOREIGN KEY ("partner_region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_transactions_reporter_iso FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_iso") REFERENCES countries ("country_iso"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_transactions_partner_iso FOREIGN KEY ("partner_iso") REFERENCES countries ("country_iso")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_iso" TEXT /* ISO3 code of the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code (e.g., AFG for Afghanistan) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Official language(s) spoken in the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Income group classification of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_iso")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_code" INTEGER /* Code for the product being traded */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., electronics, textiles) */,
  "unit_weight" REAL /* Weight of a single unit of the product */,
  "unit_value" REAL /* Average value of a single unit of the product */,
  "hs_code" TEXT /* Harmonized System (HS) code for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_flows" (
  "trade_flow_code" INTEGER /* Code for the trade flow */,
  "trade_flow_name" TEXT /* Name of the trade flow (e.g., Import, Export) */,
  "flow_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the trade flow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_flow_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the region (e.g., SA for South Asia) */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the region is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_groups" (
  "income_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the income group (e.g., Low income, High income) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income group */,
  "group_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the income group (e.g., LI for Low income) */,
  "gni_per_capita" REAL /* Gross National Income (GNI) per capita for the income group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_group_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_values" (
  "trade_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade value record */,
  "product_code" INTEGER /* Code for the product being traded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trade value record */,
  "total_trade_value" REAL /* Total trade value in USD */,
  "average_unit_price" REAL /* Average unit price of the product */,
  "total_quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity of the product traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_value_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "total_imports" REAL /* Total imports value in USD */,
  "total_exports" REAL /* Total exports value in USD */,
  "trade_balance" REAL /* Trade balance (exports - imports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation record */,
  "product_code" INTEGER /* Code for the product being translated */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region being translated */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the translation */,
  "translation" TEXT /* Translated text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_region_name FOREIGN KEY ("region_name") REFERENCES regions ("region_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_product_code FOREIGN KEY ("product_code") REFERENCES products ("product_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "tariffs" (
  "tariff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tariff record */,
  "product_code" INTEGER /* Code for the product being tariffed */,
  "country_iso" TEXT /* ISO3 code of the country imposing the tariff */,
  "tariff_rate" REAL /* Tariff rate imposed */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the tariff */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tariff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tariffs_country_iso FOREIGN KEY ("country_iso") REFERENCES countries ("country_iso"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tariffs_product_code FOREIGN KEY ("product_code") REFERENCES products ("product_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_agreements" (
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agreement record */,
  "country_iso" TEXT /* ISO3 code of the country participating in the agreement */,
  "partner_iso" TEXT /* ISO3 code of the partner country or region */,
  "agreement_name" TEXT /* Name of the trade agreement */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the agreement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agreement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_agreements_country_iso FOREIGN KEY ("country_iso") REFERENCES countries ("country_iso"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_agreements_partner_iso FOREIGN KEY ("partner_iso") REFERENCES countries ("country_iso")
)
